name: punch-camera-smooth-follow
description: Verify the character begins the punch slide before a detached scriptable camera follows smoothly.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer task.wait(1) local playerGui=p:WaitForChild('PlayerGui',10) assert(playerGui,'PlayerGui missing') local g=playerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD',10) assert(g,'PunchWallHUD missing') local automation=g:WaitForChild('PunchWallClientAutomation',10) assert(automation,'client automation missing') local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local camera=workspace.CurrentCamera local before=root.Position local baseCameraPosition=camera.CFrame.Position automation:Invoke('Punch') task.wait(0.14) local earlyCameraMove=(camera.CFrame.Position-baseCameraPosition).Magnitude local earlyCameraHeld=earlyCameraMove<0.05 local earlyCameraType=camera.CameraType.Name task.wait(0.35) local rootMoveDuringPunch=(root.Position-before).Magnitude local followCameraMoved=(camera.CFrame.Position-baseCameraPosition).Magnitude>0.1 task.wait(0.65) return H:JSONEncode({delay=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowDelaySeconds'),enabled=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowEnabled'),rootMove=rootMoveDuringPunch,earlyCameraHeld=earlyCameraHeld,earlyCameraMove=earlyCameraMove,earlyCameraType=earlyCameraType,followCameraMoved=followCameraMoved,activeAfter=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowActive'),cameraTypeAfter=camera.CameraType.Name,modeAfter=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraMode')})

steps.label: character leads detached camera with smooth follow
